name: Readarr
compose:
name: slashnode-readarr
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/readarr:develop-version-0.4.18.2805
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8787:8787
  mac:
    image: getumbrel/media-app-configurator:v1.3.0
    container_name: mac
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      APP_ID: readarr
      APP_URL: http://readarr_server_1:8787
      TRANSMISSION_HOST: transmission_server_1
      TRANSMISSION_PORT: '9091'
      ROOT_FOLDER: /downloads/books
      QBITTORRENT_INSTALLED: ${APP_READARR_QBITTORRENT_INSTALLED:-"false"}
      QBITTORRENT_HOST: qbittorrent_server_1
      QBITTORRENT_PORT: '8080'
      SABNZBD_INSTALLED: ${APP_READARR_SABNZBD_INSTALLED:-"false"}
      SABNZBD_HOST: sabnzbd_web_1
      SABNZBD_PORT: '8080'
      SABNZBD_API_KEY: ${APP_READARR_SABNZBD_API_KEY:-""}
    volumes:
      - mac_data-config:/config
      - mac_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-readarr_server_data-config
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-readarr_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
  mac_data-config:
    name: slashnode-readarr_mac_data-config
  mac_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-readarr_mac_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (readarr). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://readarr.com/.
